objective: Implement a multi-agent orchestration (Auditor, Investigator, Executioner) to optimize Nutanix-based VDI resources via log correlation and automated curfewing. Detailed intent in .ralph/NARRATIVE.md and atomic requirements in .ralph/REQUIREMENTS.md.

target_architecture.orchestration: Multi-agent system using Claude-Code or Bedrock.
target_architecture.observability: Citrix DDC OData API, StoreFront Logs, and ServiceNow Ticket API.
target_architecture.identity: Dedicated Service Account with Least Privilege.

user_stories.title: Service Account, Secrets Management & Full Audit Log Infrastructure
user_stories.description: Establish secure credential storage and a detailed audit logging framework capturing all agent decisions and API interactions.
acceptance_criteria: Secure loading of Service Account credentials via .env (NFR-SEC-001).
Implement audit logging to capture internal decisions, full API requests/responses, and state transitions (FR-EXEC-002).
Implement 'Atomizer' logic to truncate findings to <280 characters for context efficiency (NFR-PERF-001).
Ensure no credentials or sensitive data are ever logged.

user_stories.title: Nutanix API: Connectivity & Spec-Version Handling
user_stories.description: Implement the base Prism V3 client with mandatory spec_version retrieval.
acceptance_criteria: Implement NutanixClient class with basic auth support.
Implement get_vm() method to retrieve VM metadata and spec_version (NFR-NTNX-005).
Verify connectivity and successful metadata retrieval from a Prism endpoint.

user_stories.title: Nutanix API: Instance Power & Reset Actions
user_stories.description: Implement the atomic actions for Power Off, Restart, and Reset on Nutanix VMs.
acceptance_criteria: Implement set_power_state() using the intentful PUT pattern with spec_version matching.
Implement ACPI/Guest shutdown and reboot actions via POST endpoints (FR-NTNX-003).
Integrate Whitelist check (FR-NTNX-005) to block actions on restricted instances.

user_stories.title: Nutanix API: Instance Whitelist Management
user_stories.description: Implement a persistent mechanism to exclude specific VDI instances from curfew/reset actions.
acceptance_criteria: Create a persistent whitelist store (FR-NTNX-005).
Implement logic to check instance ID/Name against the whitelist.
Verify power actions are blocked and logged for whitelisted instances.

user_stories.title: Execution Control: Dry-Run Mode Implementation
user_stories.description: Implement a toggleable non-destructive mode for all agentic actions.
acceptance_criteria: Implement a global DRY_RUN configuration flag (FR-EXEC-001).
When active, all 'Executioner' API writes must be intercepted and logged instead of executed.
Verify the audit log captures the intended 'Proposal' with the 'Dry Run' marker.

user_stories.title: Citrix DDC: Session State Discovery
user_stories.description: Establish connectivity to the Citrix DDC OData/Broker API to track session duration.
acceptance_criteria: Connect to the Citrix Broker Service OData API.
Filter and identify sessions with IdleDuration > 1 hour (FR-NTNX-001).
Verify correlation between Citrix Session and Nutanix VM ID.

user_stories.title: Citrix StoreFront: Log Ingestion & UUID Extraction
user_stories.description: Implement log-tailing or ingestion for StoreFront to capture Error Trace UUIDs.
acceptance_criteria: Identify and ingest StoreFront delivery logs.
Implement regex parser to extract the 'Error Trace UUID' from log entries (FR-LOGS-001).
Verify successful extraction from sample log datasets.

user_stories.title: ServiceNow: Ticket Parsing & Correlation
user_stories.description: Implement the Investigator's ability to extract UUIDs from ServiceNow ticket fields.
acceptance_criteria: Connect to ServiceNow Table API and retrieve 'incident' records.
Extract UUIDs from ticket descriptions/comments.
Verify correlation between ServiceNow Incident and Citrix Log UUID.

user_stories.title: Identity Audit: AD & SailPoint Integration
user_stories.description: Verify if a user's failure is due to missing AD group memberships or SailPoint entitlements.
acceptance_criteria: Implement AD/LDAP query for user group memberships.
Implement SailPoint Table API check for 'Requested' vs 'Granted' status (FR-NTNX-004).
Identify and flag 'Entitlement Desync' where the user is missing required access.

user_stories.title: Executioner: Safety-Valve Logic (10% Buffer)
user_stories.description: Throttle power actions to 10% of cluster capacity in a 15-min window.
acceptance_criteria: Track pending and recent power actions in a stateful window.
Calculate and enforce the 10% safety threshold (NFR-REL-001).
Verify that actions exceeding the threshold are queued or rejected.

user_stories.title: Auditor: Geo-Regional Usage & KPI Database
user_stories.description: Build the 7-day rolling window database for tracking regional trends and initiative KPIs.
acceptance_criteria: Implement local persistent store for Geo-regional usage trends (FR-NTNX-002).
Identify 9-to-5 'Warm-up' windows for regional clusters.
Implement data collection for M-001 (Waste), M-002 (MTTR), M-004 (Density), and M-006 (Accuracy) as defined in NARRATIVE.md.

user_stories.title: Auditor: Zombie & Orphan Detection
user_stories.description: Identify VMs 'On' in Nutanix but 'Unregistered' in Citrix Broker.
acceptance_criteria: Perform state comparison between Nutanix Prism and Citrix Broker (FR-LOGS-002).
List and flag 'Zombies' (On/Unregistered) for remediation.
Verify detection accuracy with sample 'Unregistered' instances.

user_stories.title: Reporting: Service Efficiency Summary
user_stories.description: Generate a structured representation of discovered connections and initiative performance.
acceptance_criteria: Export dependency graph (User -> StoreFront -> DDC -> Nutanix).
Generate a performance summary including all KPIs (M-001, M-002, M-004, M-006).
Format output as structured JSON/Markdown.
